expectations.text: Output has at least 3 markdown H2/H3 sections (evidence of multi-angle coverage)
expectations.evidence: 8 H2 sections including SQLite, PostgreSQL, Key Tradeoffs Summary table, When to Use each, Practical Recommendation, Final Verdict

expectations.text: Mentions concurrency or write contention as a tradeoff
expectations.evidence: Concurrency listed as SQLite weakness: 'Single writer can operate at a time'; MVCC listed as PostgreSQL strength
Scalability in comparison table and 'When to Use PostgreSQL' section; 'Might grow' addressed in recommendation

expectations.text: Provides a concrete recommendation or decision guidance
expectations.evidence: ## Practical Recommendation section with 'Start with PostgreSQL' as primary advice and clear reasoning

expectations.text: Has a key takeaways or summary section
expectations.evidence: ## Key Tradeoffs Summary table + ## Final Verdict section

notes: Well-structured output with comparison table. Good coverage but less depth on the modern SQLite ecosystem (Litestream, Turso, WAL tuning), no real-world case studies, and no source URLs. The recommendation is sound but less nuanced ('start with PostgreSQL' vs with-skill's conditional framework).
